description_long: This is a medium-sized, trapezoidal woven handbag with a natural straw-like appearance and a warm golden-yellow hue. The exterior features a detailed floral embroidery design with multicolored flowers and stems, adding a decorative and artisanal touch. The bag has two sturdy, white rope handles attached at the top, suitable for carrying by hand or over the shoulder. A central strap with a button or snap closure is visible, adorned with a matching floral embellishment. The woven texture gives the surface a semi-soft, tactile feel, while the structure appears lightweight yet durable. The interior is likely lined with fabric, providing a soft compartment for personal belongings.
description: A golden-yellow woven handbag with floral embroidery, white rope handles, and a decorative central strap closure. The bag has a trapezoidal shape and a textured, artisanal finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the triangular profile, woven texture, and the two white rope handles extending upward.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the floral embroidery, decorative central strap with a flower, and the full width of the bag.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the woven pattern and the bag's depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel with a continuation of the floral embroidery and the central strap detail.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, fixed white rope handles attached at the top for hand or shoulder carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Central strap with a button or snap closure located at the top center of the bag.
attribute_decorative_elements: Floral embroidery on the front and back, decorative flower on the closure strap.
attribute_pattern: Woven basket pattern with floral embroidery.
